gates.nextAction: Run npm run inventory:source and fix missing required source assets.
Keep lint:npm as a small auto-discovery harness, not a hand-maintained file list.
Run cargo check/test/build on a host with dependency access.
Keep the runtime trace passing before runtime claims.
Stage and verify at least one native binary/platform package before claiming published install readiness.

wrongPracticeRisks: Thin npm launcher install can be useful, but it is not the same as published native binary install.
nextMoves: Stage and verify at least one native binary/platform package before claiming published install readiness.
